description: Baseline benchmark data for VULCAN scalability stress tests. These thresholds represent expected minimum performance levels for regression detection.

system.notes: Baseline established on standard CI runner environment (GitHub Actions ubuntu-latest)

baseline.description: Minimal load - establishes baseline performance characteristics
baseline.notes: Baseline scenario with minimal concurrent load to establish performance floor. Latency threshold increased for CI environments.

light_load.description: Light concurrent load - typical interactive usage pattern
light_load.notes: Simulates typical interactive usage with moderate parallelism

medium_load.description: Medium load - tests agent pool scaling behavior
medium_load.notes: Medium load tests agent pool scaling and resource contention. Success rate threshold lowered for CI environment variability.

heavy_load.description: Heavy load - stress tests all system components
heavy_load.notes: Heavy load stress tests all components under maximum expected production load

regression_thresholds.latency_increase_tolerance_description: 20% latency increase allowed before flagging regression
regression_thresholds.success_rate_degradation_tolerance_descr: 10% success rate degradation allowed before flagging regression

sla_requirements.description: Service Level Agreement requirements for production deployment
